title: pynetworkin: Kinase–substrate network prediction
description: pynetworkin is a modernised implementation of the NetworKIN algorithm for kinase–substrate network prediction. It integrates pynetphorest (NetPhoREST atlas) for motif scoring, SQLAlchemy/PostgreSQL for data persistence, Numba for numerical acceleration, OmniPath and STRING v12.0 for live network data, and a novel false-negative recovery step based on network context proximity.
